expectations.text: Correctly explains the var hoisting / shared closure pitfall (all closures share the same 'i' variable)
expectations.evidence: Lines 6-18: explains var is function-scoped, one i shared across iterations, value is 5 when handlers run

expectations.text: Offers fix using let instead of var
expectations.evidence: Lines 24-38: 'Fix 1: Use let instead of var' with code example

expectations.text: Offers a more functional solution using Array.from or map instead of the imperative loop
The functional solution avoids mutation (no push)
expectations.evidence: Array.from and .map examples create the array directly without push
